# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_style_refactor_to_class_and_fixture_and_removed_alternatives_block__a1():
    source_path = '/workspace/conans/test/integration/build_requires/test_build_requires_source_method.py'
    source = open(source_path, encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'class TestBuildEnvSource' in source, "Expected a pytest test class 'TestBuildEnvSource' (refactor from a single function)."

def test_style_refactor_to_class_and_fixture_and_removed_alternatives_block__a2():
    source_path = '/workspace/conans/test/integration/build_requires/test_build_requires_source_method.py'
    source = open(source_path, encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert '@pytest.fixture()' in source and 'def client(self):' in source, "Expected a pytest fixture 'client' method inside the test class for shared setup."

def test_style_refactor_to_class_and_fixture_and_removed_alternatives_block__a3():
    source_path = '/workspace/conans/test/integration/build_requires/test_build_requires_source_method.py'
    source = open(source_path, encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'def test_build_requires_source' not in source, "Did not expect legacy top-level 'test_build_requires_source' after style refactor."

def test_style_refactor_to_class_and_fixture_and_removed_alternatives_block__a4():
    source_path = '/workspace/conans/test/integration/build_requires/test_build_requires_source_method.py'
    source = open(source_path, encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'ALTERNATIVE 1' not in source and 'ALTERNATIVE 2' not in source and ('ALTERNATIVE 3' not in source) and ('ALTERNATIVE 4' not in source), "Expected old 'ALTERNATIVE 1..4' comment blocks to be removed in the refactored test."

def test_style_refactor_to_class_and_fixture_and_removed_alternatives_block__a5():
    source_path = '/workspace/conans/test/integration/build_requires/test_build_requires_source_method.py'
    source = open(source_path, encoding='utf-8').read()
    tests = re.findall('^\\s*def\\s+(test_[a-zA-Z0-9_]+)\\s*\\(', source, flags=re.M)
    assert len(tests) >= 4, f'Expected refactor into multiple focused test methods (>=4), found {len(tests)}: {tests}'
